rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Suspicious Powershell Cmdlets (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Suspicious Powershell Cmdlets (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 75b32717-173f-45d0-9447-be84f8bdcce5
status: experimental
description: Detects WMI-related suspicious powershell cmdlets. Part of the RedCanary
  2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - invoke-wmimethod
    - invoke-cimmethod
    - get-wmiobject
    - get-ciminstance
    - wmiclass
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown.
level: low
